• Implemented all requested fixes and verified them.

  ### Fixed

  1. Perfect-match ambiguity in aim creation

  - If multiple “perfect” matches are found, selection now stays on Create new (no auto-link).
  - File: packages/frontend/src/components/AimCreationModal.vue

  2. dd phase delete regression

  - Restored correct delete behavior by fixing wrong deletePhase call signature.
  - File: packages/frontend/src/stores/ui/keyboard-actions.ts

  3. Enter-to-save in aim edit modal

  - In edit mode, Enter on input/select fields now saves and closes (excluding textarea/tag input behavior).
  - Also added key handling on parent/child weight fields.
  - File: packages/frontend/src/components/AimCreationModal.vue

  4. Watchdog action menu focus timing

  - Prevented early terminal refocus when an implied follow-up modal (e.g. aim search) opens.
  - Terminal now refocuses after the follow-up action closes (for aim search flow).
  - Files:
      - packages/frontend/src/components/WatchdogActionsOverlay.vue
      - packages/frontend/src/components/WatchdogPanel.vue

  ### Tests added/updated

  - Added regression tests for:
      - ambiguous perfect-match defaults to create-new
      - Enter saves in edit mode
      - phase deletion on second d
  - Updated impacted test expectation for current Aim stats markup.
  - Files:
      - packages/frontend/src/components/__tests__/AimCreationModal.spec.ts
      - packages/frontend/src/__tests__/ui-teleport.spec.ts
      - packages/frontend/src/__tests__/Aim.spec.ts

  ### Verification

  - npm run type-check -w frontend passed
  - npm run test:unit -w frontend passed (16 files, 68 tests)
